parts.text: Flat vector-style app icon logomark: the letters G and F merged into one bold geometric monogram, with the top stroke of the F extending into a clean upward growth arrow. Electric blue and white mark on a deep navy background. Absolutely no text, no words, no letters other than the G F monogram itself, no tagline - icon mark only. Flat design, crisp sharp edges, no 3D bevel, no gloss, no glow effects. Mark is large and centered, filling about 80% of the square canvas. Modern SaaS fintech style, high contrast, instantly readable at small sizes, suitable as an Android launcher app icon. Square 1:1 image.
